case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY BILL HALL BAIL BONDS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00
CASH SUBSTITUTION OF SURETY BONDS. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
